context: Tests style extraction from a reference document (not a named style or inline description). The reference has a distinctive voice: specific anecdotes, dry humor, first-person, short-long sentence rhythm, technical precision. The source is a corporate memo full of AI patterns. Tests whether the skill can extract the voice profile and apply it while preserving all factual data.

checklist.name: Voice extracted from reference
checklist.description: The output reads like the author of reference-voice.md wrote it: first-person perspective, specific over general, dry humor present, technical precision without corporate abstraction

checklist.name: Sentence rhythm matches reference
checklist.description: The output has varied sentence lengths matching the reference pattern: short declarative sentences mixed with longer complex ones. Not uniform medium-length sentences.

checklist.name: AI vocabulary cleaned
checklist.description: Corporate AI vocabulary from the source is replaced: 'leveraged', 'cutting-edge', 'streamline', 'robust', 'seamless', 'serves as the backbone', 'transformative', 'navigated the landscape', 'fostering', 'pivotal', 'groundbreaking', 'showcasing', 'harness', 'plays a significant role in shaping'

checklist.name: Copula avoidance fixed
checklist.description: 'serves as the backbone' is replaced with 'is' or a direct construction

checklist.name: Preamble and hedging removed
checklist.description: 'It is important to note that' and similar hedges from the source are removed

checklist.name: False range fixed
checklist.description: 'From our platform team to our application developers' false-inclusivity range is replaced with specific language

checklist.name: Deployment frequency preserved
checklist.description: The exact metric 'from weekly to 12x daily' appears in the output

checklist.name: Recovery time preserved
checklist.description: The exact metric '4 hours to 18 minutes' appears in the output

checklist.name: Cost reduction preserved
checklist.description: The exact metric '34%' infrastructure cost reduction appears in the output

checklist.name: Concrete specificity over abstraction
checklist.description: Abstract corporate phrases like 'operational excellence' and 'container orchestration challenges' are replaced with concrete, specific language in the reference author's style

checklist.name: Direct verbs over inflated ones
checklist.description: The output uses 'is', 'has', 'was' instead of 'serves as', 'stands as', 'boasts'. Simple verbs throughout.

checklist.name: No fabricated experience
checklist.description: Personal anecdotes in the output (if any) are clearly framed as the kind of thing the reference author would say, not fabricated specific memories that never happened

checklist.name: Summary provided
checklist.description: The skill provides a brief summary mentioning the style extraction, voice shift, and anti-pattern count
